query:
SELECT 
  id, name, role, isLocked, 
  masterPortraitUrl, previewImageUrl, faceVideoUrl,
  enableLipSync,
  LEFT(description, 200) as description_preview
FROM videoCharacters
WHERE jobId = 510025
ORDER BY id;
